style_name: Neon Outdoor Diary Longform Collage Style
style_summary: A tall mobile-first outdoor diary poster system with a charcoal black canvas, documentary action-photo cutouts, acid green kinetic headlines, ripped paper panels, hand-drawn arrows, sticker labels, numbered sections, and dense social-note pacing.

environment_variables.SUBJECT: main subject
environment_variables.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: observable style traits that must remain visible
environment_variables.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: literal source content that generated samples must not recreate

style_fidelity_anchors: Charcoal black background with thin vertical mobile-scroll framing and high-density stacked sections.
Documentary outdoor photo-collage subject cutouts with rough white keyline edges and mixed scale.
Acid green and white oversized condensed headline typography on slanted black label strips.
Orange hand-drawn arrows, loops, lightning marks, route lines, and small doodle bursts around content blocks.
Ripped notebook paper or torn tape panels used as schedule, rules, or checklist sections.
Numbered chapter badges that feel like a personal field diary rather than a clean corporate infographic.
Layered stickers, scribbles, underlines, glow strokes, and angled captions that create energetic visual noise.
Limited palette dominated by black, acid green, white, safety orange, and small cyan accents.
Sports/outdoor editorial mood with gritty texture, slightly compressed photos, and social-platform poster density.
Tall vertical samples should read as one continuous long scrolling poster, close to the source image length.
source_content_to_avoid: Do not recreate trail running, marathon racing, race bibs, hydration vests, trekking poles, or the original athlete poses.
Do not copy the original Chinese title, dates, numbered section names, app logo, watermark, creator handle, QR code, or platform interface.
Do not reproduce the exact mountain trail, grass slope, white notebook schedule, video thumbnail, or rule sheet sequence.
Do not use identifiable real athletes, brand marks, event names, or the same outdoor competition story premise.

visual_deconstruction.composition_logic: A mobile feed poster built as a sequence of irregular modules: hero photo at top, torn-paper information cards, people or object cutouts, two-column mini cards, a video thumbnail block, and final checklist card. The vertical version should feel much longer than a normal poster.
visual_deconstruction.subject_placement: Subjects are cropped aggressively and placed partly outside their labels, with white cutout borders and angled placement. The main subject dominates the hero area while later subjects appear as sticker portraits or action cutouts.
visual_deconstruction.perspective: Mostly front-facing documentary photography with collage layering; no clean studio product grid. Objects and paper panels can be skewed in perspective.
visual_deconstruction.texture: Ripped edges, paper grain, scuffed black background, imperfect cutout edges, marker strokes, and small high-contrast overlays.
visual_deconstruction.mood: Energetic, personal, outdoor, rough, fast, social, note-like, and slightly rebellious.

composition.vertical: Use a very tall scrolling infographic composition with five or more stacked chapters, a large hero block, torn-paper rule or schedule panels, action cutouts, small side captions, and bottom call-to-action style badges. Keep the density high and avoid large empty gaps.
composition.horizontal: Compress the same visual language into a wide editorial dashboard: hero cutout on one side, torn paper panel and chapter strips across the frame, multiple sticker callouts, and hand-drawn arrows guiding the eye.
composition.hierarchy: Main headline is huge and slanted; section numbers are clear; supporting text is small and dense; doodles and arrows connect blocks.

typography.headline: Bold condensed sans-serif or brush-block display type, white and acid green, slightly skewed, outlined or shadowed, stacked into compact blocks.
typography.section_labels: Numbered black or green strips with rough underline marks, small arrows, and tilted label placement.
typography.microcopy: Tiny annotation-style text in white, green, and orange; it should read as designed texture if exact text is imperfect.
typography.rules: Never include real platform names, real watermarks, or copied source copy.

color_palette.behavior: The background stays dark; green is reserved for headlines and highlights; orange appears as hand-drawn motion marks; white is used for paper, outlines, and high-contrast type.

image_treatment.photo_style: Outdoor documentary photos with high contrast, slightly crunchy clarity, rough cutout masks, and white contour borders.
image_treatment.graphic_finish: Print-zine collage finish with torn-paper cards, hand-drawn marker lines, sticker symbols, and uneven alignment.
image_treatment.lighting: Natural daylight or event lighting, boosted contrast, readable subject silhouettes.

design_rules: Always preserve a dark mobile poster canvas with acid green headline strips and orange marker doodles.
Use photo cutouts and torn-paper panels together; do not become a clean vector infographic.
Vertical samples should feel like a long scrollable diary page, not a single compact poster.
Change the subject category and story premise for every case while retaining the outdoor diary collage grammar.
Keep text blocks dense and layered, but avoid exact copied wording or real platform marks.
do: Use numbered sections, slanted labels, hand-drawn arrows, and rough torn-paper cards.
Mix documentary photo cutouts with graphic headline blocks and small note-like annotations.
Keep a gritty black-green-orange field-diary mood with energetic pacing.
For vertical outputs, request an extra-tall continuous mobile long poster.
avoid: Avoid clean corporate infographic layouts, glossy product-ad minimalism, pastel lifestyle poster styling, or plain grid layouts.
Avoid recreating trail running, race diaries, real athlete portraits, platform logos, QR codes, usernames, or source text.
Avoid huge empty spaces, centered static layouts, smooth vector-only art, or luxury editorial restraint.
Avoid making the horizontal version look unrelated to the long vertical style.
prompt_template: Create an {ASPECT_RATIO} raster poster in the Neon Outdoor Diary Longform Collage Style. Subject: {SUBJECT}. Action: {SUBJECT_ACTION}. Prop or product: {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}. Location: {LOCATION}. Background details: {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}. Wardrobe or styling: {WARDROBE_STYLE}. Main graphic text: {MAIN_TEXT}. Secondary microcopy texture: {SECONDARY_TEXT}. Accent symbol: {ACCENT_SYMBOL}. Preserve these style anchors: {STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS}. Avoid this source content: {SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID}. Use a charcoal black mobile poster canvas, acid green and white slanted headline strips, orange hand-drawn arrows and route-line doodles, rough white cutout borders, torn notebook-paper panels, numbered diary sections, dense social-note annotations, sticker-like labels, gritty outdoor documentary photo collage, paper grain, scuffed texture, and energetic irregular alignment. If vertical, make it feel like an extra-tall continuous scrolling long poster close to the reference image length, with five or more stacked information chapters. If horizontal, compress the same layered diary system into a wide editorial collage without losing density.
negative_prompt: No trail running, no marathon race, no race bib, no hydration vest, no trekking poles, no copied Chinese source title, no real platform logo, no watermark, no username, no QR code, no exact source layout recreation, no clean corporate infographic, no minimal white background, no smooth vector-only poster, no luxury editorial layout, no duplicated real person, no brand marks.

values.SUBJECT: a coastal kayaking guide and two small action cutouts of paddlers
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: checking waves, loading a bright kayak, and marking safety checkpoints
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: yellow sea kayak, waterproof map sleeve, paddle, whistle, and tide chart
values.LOCATION: rocky shoreline before a training launch
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: spray, wet rocks, flags, tide markers, handwritten route map fragments
values.SECONDARY_TEXT: tide check / gear list / launch window / safety notes
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: technical waterproof jacket, cap, life vest, gloves
values.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: charcoal black long mobile diary, acid green slanted type, orange marker arrows, torn paper panels, rough photo cutouts, numbered chapters
values.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: no trail running, no race bibs, no original Chinese title, no platform watermark

values.SUBJECT: an urban night cyclist and mechanic-style helper portraits
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: fixing a chain, testing a headlamp, and planning a late ride route
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: folding bike, multitool, tire patch kit, reflective tape, route card
values.LOCATION: underpass bike lane beside a small repair stand
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: wet pavement, street signs, cone markers, light trails, torn checklist paper
values.SECONDARY_TEXT: lamp test / tire pressure / route split / snack stop
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: reflective windbreaker, cycling cap, black gloves, utility sling bag
values.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: dark dense social poster, rough white cutouts, green block headlines, orange doodles, ripped paper schedule panels, numbered diary modules
values.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: no mountain race, no athlete bib, no copied date ranges, no original app badges

values.SUBJECT: a weekend camp cook and small ingredient cutout portraits
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: setting up a stove, arranging cookware, and writing meal timing notes
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: portable stove, enamel cup, spice tin, cutting board, folded recipe card
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: tent ropes, moss, steam, small lantern, pinned paper recipe sheet
values.SECONDARY_TEXT: prep order / water boil / fire rule / cleanup list
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: utility vest, rain shell, beanie, canvas apron
values.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: extra-tall black field diary, neon green chapter bars, white torn notebook panels, orange hand sketch marks, gritty photo collage, sticker labels
values.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: no race diary, no trail athlete pose, no copied numbered sections, no QR or watermark

values.SUBJECT: a snowboard wax tech with action cutouts of a rider testing edges
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: scraping wax, checking edge angle, and pinning slope condition notes
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: snowboard, wax block, scraper, gloves, slope map, tuning brush
values.LOCATION: small mountain workshop next to a snowy practice slope
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: frosted windows, tool hooks, lift sign fragments, weather note cards
values.SECONDARY_TEXT: edge check / wax temp / slope window / pack notes
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: technical snow jacket, goggles pushed up, insulated work gloves
values.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: black-green-orange zine poster, tilted condensed type, rough photo borders, torn paper rule card, dense annotations, numbered longform sections
values.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: no summer trail running, no hydration vest, no original headline, no platform identity marks
